Kitchen Sink
Now on iOS and Android

The recipe app that starts with your fridge.

Tell us what's in your fridge, what you're feeling, and how much time you've got. We'll handle the rest — recipes, meal plan, grocery list, drink pairing included.

Download on the App Store Download on Play Store

FreeTo get started
What it does

Everything from fridge to fork.

🧠

AI Recipe Generation

Describe your situation in plain language. What you have, how many people, how much time. Kitchen Sink generates three recipe options instantly.

🎙️

Voice to Type

Hands covered in flour? Just talk to it. Describe what you want and Kitchen Sink listens. Cooking shouldn't pause for typing.

📅

Meal Planning

Plan your full week in one session. Calendar view shows your meals day by day. Switch on Meal Prep Mode and batch-cook everything at once.

🛒

Smart Grocery List

Your grocery list builds itself from your meal plan. Ingredients you already have in your Pantry are automatically removed. No duplicates, no guesswork.

🥕

Instacart Integration

Send your grocery list straight to Instacart with one tap. Skip the store, skip the typing. Ingredients show up at your door, ready to cook.

📲

Recipe Import

See something on TikTok or Instagram? Import it directly into Kitchen Sink. No more screenshot graveyards. Your saved recipes, organized and searchable, forever.

See it in action

Built for how people actually cook.

The story

Built in 2.5 weeks. Used every night.

Kitchen Sink started as a personal problem. After 13 years in automotive service operations at Tesla and BMW, the nightly dinner question was exhausting. Every recipe app assumed you already knew what you wanted to cook. None of them started with what you actually had.

Built from scratch in 2.5 weeks, launched January 23rd 2026, and hit 11,000 downloads in 10 weeks with zero paid advertising. Just real people sharing it with other real people who were tired of the same loop.

Kitchen Sink is built and maintained by a solo founder in Los Angeles. Every update comes from real user feedback.
